_comment: Mutation testing baseline — committed kill rates per hotspot module. Updated explicitly via `scripts/mutation/check_ratchet.py --update-baseline`. NEVER manually edit downward. Tolerance: 5 percentage points (set in check_ratchet.py default). Initial values seeded from Phase 6 sessions post-hoc-filtered for PEP 604 BitOr noise; see docs/migration/mutation_testing_report.md.
